segments.text: Three consecutive days of tournament runs—that's the grind right there
segments.original_text: 3日連続で大会に臨んでいるというスタイルですね

segments.text: Down throw into fair, fair, carrying it, carrying it, and closed it out with the bair!
segments.original_text: 下投げからの空前空前運んで運んで空後で押し切った

full_text: Three consecutive days of tournament runs—that's the grind right there Down throw into fair, fair, carrying it, carrying it, and closed it out with the bair! Excellent!
